description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Transport Department appeals to motorists to take note of special traffic arrangements to be implemented at Lok Ma Chau
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 運輸署呼籲駕駛人士注意落馬洲管制站及深圳灣口岸由5月9日起至10日凌晨或會實施特別交通安排

2024-05-09T00:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Subject to actual traffic conditions, special traffic arrangements may be implemented at Lok Ma Chau Control Point and Shenzhen Bay Port from 9 May to the early morning of 10 May 2024 to facilitate public transport vehicles to enter the above control points smoothly. Motorists are advised to pay attention to messages displayed on variable message signs along the road and follow the traffic signs when driving. In case of traffic obstruction, motorists are urged to exercise care and patience and take heed of instructions from the police officers on site. The Emergency Transport Coordination Centre of the Transport Department (TD) will continue to monitor the traffic and public transport services at all land-based Boundary Control Points and the Airport, and will disseminate the latest traffic news through TD's "HKeMobility" mobile application.
2024-05-09T00:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 視乎現場交通情況，落馬洲管制站及深圳灣口岸由2024年5月9日起至5月10日凌晨，或會實施特別交通安排，以便公共運輸車輛能暢順地進入上述口岸。駕駛人士應特別留意沿途可變信息顯示屏的信息，並按照交通標誌的指示駕駛。如遇交通受阻，請駕駛人士保持小心忍讓，及遵從現場警務人員的指示。 運輸署的緊急交通事故協調中心會繼續監察各陸路口岸及機場的交通及公共運輸服務情況，並透過運輸署流動應用程式「香港出行易」，發放最新的交通消息。
